ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager, regular user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "8tracks_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the 8tracks database */,
  "mbids" TEXT /* MBIDs (MusicBrainz IDs) associated with the track */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the track metadata */,
  "in_db" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track is in the database */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track mapping */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "removed_date" TEXT /* Date the track was removed from the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moods" (
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mood category */,
  "mood_name" TEXT /* Name of the mood category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mood category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre category */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_moods" (
  "track_mood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-mood mapping */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "mood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mood category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_moods_mood_id FOREIGN KEY ("mood_id") REFERENCES moods ("mood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_moods_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_genres" (
  "track_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-genre mapping */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_genres_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_info" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_artists" (
  "track_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-artist mapping */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_artists_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artist_info ("artist_id")
)
